name: Hoax.ai Evidence Posture Workbench Refusal Model

refusal_families.name: Refuse Subject Accusation
refusal_families.refusal_reason: Workbench examines artifacts, not subjects. Subject accusation is out of scope.
refusal_families.non_authorization_statement: This refusal does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, or verdict output.

refusal_families.name: Refuse Fake/Real Verdict
refusal_families.refusal_reason: Workbench structures posture language; it does not issue fake/real verdicts.
refusal_families.non_authorization_statement: This refusal does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, or verdict output.

refusal_families.name: Refuse Unsupported Certainty
refusal_families.refusal_reason: Available signals cannot support requested certainty level.
refusal_families.non_authorization_statement: This refusal does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, or verdict output.

refusal_families.name: Refuse Identity Judgment
refusal_families.refusal_reason: Identity judgment about persons is out of workbench scope.
refusal_families.non_authorization_statement: This refusal does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, or verdict output.

refusal_families.name: Refuse High-Stakes Determination
refusal_families.refusal_reason: Legal, medical, financial, and law-enforcement conclusions are out of scope.
refusal_families.non_authorization_statement: This refusal does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, or verdict output.

refusal_families.name: Refuse Score Request
refusal_families.refusal_reason: Numeric scoring and confidence grades are prohibited.
refusal_families.non_authorization_statement: This refusal does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, or verdict output.

refusal_families.name: Refuse Out-of-Scope Tool Request
refusal_families.refusal_reason: Workbench is not a detector, classifier, upload tool, or verification service.
refusal_families.non_authorization_statement: This refusal does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, or verdict output.

refusal_families.name: Refuse Evidence-Free Claim
refusal_families.refusal_reason: Claims without governed source support cannot carry workbench authority.
refusal_families.non_authorization_statement: This refusal does not authorize interface, engine, scoring, or verdict output.

non_authorization_statement: This refusal model defines future refusal behavior only. It does not authorize interface, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, or public output.
